description: Playskool Kota Triceratops — electronics repair, mechanical repair, and cleaning and refresh.
itemDetails:
Playskool Kota My Triceratops is a large-scale interactive dinosaur toy released by Hasbro's Playskool line in the late 2000s (notably 2008). It is known as an oversized ride-on/interactive prehistoric toy from a short but memorable retail window.

Kota uses molded plastic structural parts with soft-touch outer covering, internal motors/electronics, and touch or button interactivity features. Collector value is helped by its scale and relative scarcity, but shipping size and mechanism condition heavily affect market pricing.
